title: Find Your Local Library
summary: Find the nearest public library and learn its hours and services.
learnerPromise: You will be able to locate your nearest public library and know when it is open and what it offers.
whyItMatters: Public libraries provide free access to books, computers, classes, and community resources. Knowing how to find and use your library opens doors to learning and support.
realLifeUses: You need a quiet place to study or use a computer
You want to borrow books or access free digital resources
You are looking for free community events or classes
You need internet access and do not have it at home
materialsNeeded: A phone, computer, or someone who can help you search
result: You know the name, address, hours, and at least two services of your nearest public library.
youWillLearn: How to search for nearby libraries online or by phone
How to read a library's schedule and service list
How to plan a visit using transit, walking, or a ride
How to check if a library has the resources you need
miniChallenge: Look up your nearest public library online or by phone and write down its address, today's hours, and two services it offers.
steps: Search online for 'public library near me' or call a local information line
Write down the library's name, address, and phone number
Find the hours for today's day of the week
Look at the list of services (books, computers, events, Wi-Fi)
Write down two services that interest you and how you would get there
completionCriteria: You have the library's name, address, and correct hours written down
You can name at least two services the library provides
commonProblems: Search results show many libraries — check which is the closest or easiest to reach
Hours online may be outdated — call to confirm if planning a visit
Some services may require a card or appointment — check ahead
tips: Library websites often have a 'Using the Library' or 'Services' page
If you cannot get there easily, ask about book delivery or digital borrowing options
Many libraries offer free Wi-Fi and computer use even without a card
